dict.string: Osaurus uses automation to control other applications on your behalf — including agents that write and run AppleScript to automate tasks on this Mac, and plugins that use automation.
Osaurus plugins may access your calendar to read and create events.
Osaurus plugins may access your calendar to read and create events.
Osaurus plugins may access your contacts to search and read contact information.
Osaurus plugins may access your reminders to read and create tasks.
Osaurus plugins may access your location to provide location-based services.
Osaurus plugins may access your location to provide location-based services.
Osaurus uses the microphone for on-device voice transcription with FluidAudio.
Osaurus can capture screenshots and system audio only when you grant Screen Recording access.
Osaurus uses the local network to discover and connect to agents running on other devices.
